classObjective: Use the commutative, associative, identity, and inverse properties to simplify calculations and justify each step.
workedExamples: 1-3, Example 4 — Evaluate Expressions and Name Properties
1-3, Example 5 — Simplify Expressions Using Properties of Numbers
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: naming properties at each step; mental math with compatible numbers
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice evaluating expressions while naming each property used at every step
independentPractice: Practice problems simplifying expressions using properties and justifying each step
assessment: Exit ticket: simplify an expression and name all properties used
capReflection: How does naming properties at each step help you catch errors in your reasoning?
